prompt: Using the gardening calendar chart, produce a month-by-month planting guide infographic for common vegetables.
prompt_refined: Generate a comprehensive infographic that serves as a month-by-month planting, transplanting, and harvesting guide for common vegetables. Accurately extract and represent all vegetable names and their corresponding activity timelines for 'Start Seeds Indoors', 'Plant Seed/Transplant', and 'Harvest' directly from the data presented in image 1. The infographic should clearly and concisely visualize this information in a user-friendly format suitable for a gardening resource.
objects: Infographic title (e.g., "Vegetable Planting and Harvesting Guide")
Horizontal timeline with month labels (JAN, FEB, MAR, ..., DEC)
Vertical list of vegetable names (e.g., Beans, Beets, Broccoli, Brussel Sprouts, Cabbage, Carrots, Cauliflower, Corn, Cucumber, Kale, Lettuce, Onions, Peas, Peppers, Spinach, Squash, Tomato)
Horizontal colored bars indicating activity periods for each vegetable
Green-to-orange/red color gradient applied to activity bars
Horizontal grid lines separating vegetable rows
